description.ko: 우뚝 솟은 인디고 빛 마천루, 선명한 마젠타 홀로그램, 그리고 미래형 교통수단의 줄지어 흐르는 빛의 궤적을 특징으로 하는 비 내리는 사이버펑크 메트로폴리스입니다.
description.en: A rainy cyberpunk metropolis featuring towering indigo skyscrapers, vibrant magenta holograms, and the streaking light trails of futuristic transport.

prompt: A cinematic wide-angle shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Cobalt Rain Arteries.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are connected by complex tiers of glowing maglev tracks. Massive 3D holograms of geometric koi fish pulse in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan light above the crowds. Heavy monsoon rain creates a kaleidoscopic distortion of light on wet metallic pavement. High-speed vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the melancholic soul of a futuristic megacity.
